title: ToolResult
description: Schema-constrained summary of a tool execution result. All tool outputs entering model context must conform to this schema.

tool.description: Name of the tool that was executed.

preview.description: Short preview of the output (max 200 chars normally, 500 after fallback truncation).

parsed.description: Tool-specific extracted fields from jq-equivalent filter, or null.

truncation_flag.description: True when output was truncated to fit within the token ceiling.

original_bytes.description: Original output byte count before truncation.

original_lines.description: Original output line count before truncation.

cache_hit.description: True when result was served from the dedup cache.
